title: Puglite Application Builder
description: Build application with esbuild and Puglite template support

browser.description: The full path for the browser entry point to the app, relative to the current workspace.

plugins.description: List of esbuild plugin module paths, relative to workspace root. Each module may export a plugin or an array of plugins.

server.description: The full path for the server entry point to the app, relative to the current workspace.

tsConfig.description: The full path for the TypeScript configuration file.

outputPath.description: Specify the output path relative to workspace root.

index.description: Configures the generation of the application's HTML index.

polyfills.description: A list of polyfills to include in the build.

styles.description: Global styles to be included in the build.

scripts.description: Global scripts to be included in the build.

stylePreprocessorOptions.description: Options to pass to style preprocessors.

inlineStyleLanguage.description: The stylesheet language to use for inline component styles.

optimization.description: Enables optimization of the build output.

sourceMap.description: Output source maps for scripts and styles.

outputHashing.description: Define the output filename cache-busting hashing mode.

aot.description: Build using Ahead of Time compilation. Always forced to true by this builder.

budgets.description: Budget thresholds to ensure parts of your application stay within boundaries.

extractLicenses.description: Extract all licenses in a separate file.

baseHref.description: Base url for the application being built.

define.description: Defines global identifiers that will be replaced with a specified constant value.

externalDependencies.description: Exclude the listed external dependencies from being bundled into the bundle.

allowedCommonJsDependencies.description: A list of CommonJS packages that are allowed to be used without a build time warning.

namedChunks.description: Use file name for lazy loaded chunks.

deleteOutputPath.description: Delete the output path before building.

poll.description: Enable and define the file watching poll time period in milliseconds.

verbose.description: Adds more details to output logging.

progress.description: Log progress to the console while building.
